articles.title: Inflation hitting your wallet? A look at 5 products that got dearer and 5 that got cheaper in current economic scenario
articles.description: From petrol and milk to daily essentials, households are feeling the impact of rising prices due to the war in West Asia. But which top 5 products exactly got costlier and cheaper in April 2026? Let’s explore this.

articles.title: Final Dividend: Retail stock in focus as company declares cash payout, check details here
articles.description: Meanwhile, market benchmark indices Sensex and Nifty were trading flat after falling in early trade on Tuesday amid a mixed trend in Asian equities and a rise in crude oil prices.

articles.title: CNG Prices Rise Second Time In 10 Days In Madhya Pradesh Amid Iran Conflict; Rates Up By ₹6 Per Kg In Two Months
articles.description: CNG prices in Madhya Pradesh have increased for the second time in 10 days, with rates in Bhopal rising to ₹94.75 per kg. Think Gas raised prices by ₹1 per kg, taking the total hike to ₹6 in two months. Petrol and diesel prices have also increased repeatedly, while CNG vehicle sales continue to rise due to better mileage and lower pollution.

articles.title: Diesel siphoning attempt foiled in late-night raid on petrol station
articles.description: IPOH: The Domestic Trade and Cost of Living Ministry seized 200 litres of diesel in a raid at a petrol station in Batu Gajah on Monday (May 25) night.

articles.title: Higher oil prices to buoy Sarawak's state sales tax revenue
articles.description: KUCHING: Sarawak's revenue from state sales tax on petroleum products is expected to grow due to rising oil prices, says Premier Tan Sri Abang Johari Openg.

articles.title: Kejriwal questions why PM Modi isn’t buying cheap Russian, Iranian oil; BJP answers
articles.description: Crude oil prices surged worldwide due to the war and the Hormuz crisis, yet India remained one of the few countries where the government repeatedly reduced petrol and diesel prices to provide relief to the public, says BJP's Amit Malviya.

articles.title: Gold slips as US-Iran tensions lift oil, stoke inflation fears
articles.description: GOLD fell on Tuesday as fresh U.S. attacks in Iran pushed oil prices higher, fuelling concerns around inflation and higher-for-longer interest rates.

articles.title: Fuel prices hiked again: Economists warn cab rides, grocery delivery, vegetables and daily essentials to cost more next
articles.description: As petrol and diesel prices rise again, economists warn the impact could soon spread beyond fuel pumps. From vegetables and groceries to transport, delivery services and manufacturing costs, higher diesel prices are expected to push inflation higher across multiple sectors of the economy.

articles.title: Asian shares and oil prices are mixed after the US launches strikes in southern Iran
articles.description: US futures jumped. Oil prices were mixed, with Brent crude rising but still trading below $100 a barrel while US benchmark crude oil fell.

articles.title: Subdued European Shares Amid Rising Tensions
articles.description: European shares showed little movement on Tuesday due to renewed tensions after the U.S. launched attacks on Iran. The STOXX 600 index remained largely unchanged, following its recent high, as oil prices rose and airlines were affected. Ferrari's substantial loss further impacted the automobile sector.
